chunks.title: Selection of a New Queen
chunks.reason: Describes the king's decree to gather virgins and appoint a new queen after Vashti.

chunks.title: Introduction of Mordecai and Esther
chunks.reason: Introduces Mordecai's lineage and his raising of his orphaned cousin Esther.

chunks.title: Esther Enters the Harem
chunks.reason: Details Esther's entry into the harem, her favor with Hegai, and the regulations for the virgins.

chunks.title: Esther Becomes Queen
chunks.reason: Narrates Esther's audience with the king, her coronation, and the celebration of her feast.

chunks.title: The Plot Against the King
chunks.reason: Records Mordecai's discovery of a conspiracy by two eunuchs and their subsequent execution.
